title: LOUISIANA NUCLEAR ENERGY AND
doc_html:
CHAPTER 6.  LOUISIANA NUCLEAR ENERGY AND

RADIATION CONTROL LAW

§2101.  Citation

This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Nuclear Energy and Radiation Control Law."

Acts 1979, No. 449, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1980.
